description_long: This is a compact, modern espresso coffee machine with a predominantly white body accented by black trim and a few red highlights. The machine features a rectangular base with a metallic drip tray and a raised section housing the brewing head. A portafilter handle extends from the front, and a steam wand is visible on the right side for frothing milk. The top section includes a control panel with three red indicator lights or buttons. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and rounded edges. The machine appears to be made primarily of plastic with some metal components for durability and function.
description: A sleek, white and black espresso coffee machine with a portafilter, steam wand, and a control panel featuring red indicators.
description_view_0: Front view showing the portafilter handle, drip tray, steam wand, and control panel with red indicators.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the portafilter handle extending outward and the machine's compact profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back and the blocky, rectangular shape of the machine.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the portafilter handle and the steam wand protruding from the side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three rectangular red indicators or buttons arranged horizontally on the top front section.
